Makes me consider taking to the high seas again so I can control my own music, rather than spend money on an app with a mind of it's own.
author: Calum B

text: very poor experience, no proper response from support team either, despite paying for my subscription, my account isn't subscribed at all, and issue d refund dint refund at all , and all the help the support team could do me is to tell me too wait for my refund, and restart for a new subscription, And the worst thing is my second subscription also faced same issue, despite two times payment, I didn't get any plan subscribed.And there is no response from team too. its soo irritating,
author: Yadamala Sridevi

text: spotify is dope for music once you pay for it. Using it for free is probably the worst experience on the internet. so many ads. its non-stop. you might get 3 ads for 1 song. the ratio is that bad. then even if you paid for the premium, and you try to listen to podcasts, the ads are back. some podcast might not create space for ads so Spotify will force space for it. anyways, still the best app for music tho.
author: Elvis Amissi

text: I've enjoyed using Spotify, but the free version has some frustrating limitations. One major issue is that users often cannot choose the exact song they want to play and are forced to use shuffle play. Another problem is that it's not possible to start a song from a specific part or timestamp, which makes it difficult to listen to favorite sections of a track. While I understand that premium features help support the platform, these restrictions can make the free experience less enjoyable.
author: Gaje Singh

text: the app is good but the biggest problem is all the ads it contains. whenever I play a song or change to other, it's starts playing ads 2-3 minimum and if you don't have premium then there is a limit how many songs you can play in a day and how many you can skip per hour and after limit is over it won't allow you to play song of you choice. and even thou after some ads it says enjoy next 30mins of uninterrupted music but the moment you change the song you get another.
author: Akash

text: I recently used Spotify and really enjoyed the overall experience. The app is easy to use, the sound quality is great, and there’s a huge variety of songs and playlists available for every mood. I especially like the personalized recommendations and how smoothly the music plays without interruptions. It’s very convenient for listening to music anytime, whether relaxing, studying, or traveling. Overall, it’s one of the best music streaming apps I’ve used.
author: Rohani Redzwa

text: THIS SUBSCRIPTION THING MAKE IT STOP. I can't listen for 15 minutes without 2 ads, and ALSO, I can't choose my song on my own, apparently. I wanted to change to another app, but unfortunately, most of the songs I like aren't on any other platforms. There are only 6 skips per hour, and it's horrible. I don't want to pay 5 dollars for a goddamn music app for the sake of surviving on a low budget.
author: Buyanzaya Tuvshinbat

text: Premium User. The app is becoming more and more unusable. Slow, reacts delayed IF it reacts at all, randomly pauses and is generally super janky to the point it cant be explained with Cache or too much saved songs (???) anymore. Its just obvious its becoming more and more vibecoded AI slop. Which is a shame since the app COULD be so good. The algorithm is weird at times but generally decent, I discovered a lot of artists I didnt know.
author: Marcel Weber

text: This stupid app won't let free users listen to music in peace. After a limit, you cannot skip songs. You are recommended RANDOM songs not in your playlist and cannot do anything about it. You cannot even skip to a certain part of the song you are listening to. And the ads are so long and frequent it makes this app hell. Spotify needs heavy improvement for free users
author: Dwarf

text: For some reason Spotify have decided to introduce a new widget that is twice as big and insist that everyone switches to it. I literally just want the ability to see what is playing, pause, play and skip - like every other media player ever. Instead I either need to delegate 4 of my apps or Spotify itself to another page. I don't need or want things on the home page making suggestions or whatever else these new features are supposed to do. I should switch to Amazon which still has a 4x1.
author: Kevin Spicer

text: I use Spotify exclusively for podcasts. Spotify is by far the most enshitified app i have ever used. The lowest decision the CEO made was removing the option to turn off autoplay. Now I need to set 'stop at end episode' every single time. A new bug is, many ads stop the episodes playback, and remove the 'stop at end episode'. Further, they have removed the filter that removed played episodes. Pure Trash!
author: Quentin Rowe

text: It is the worst music app ever!! Every thing needs premium... Now this app is useless. It lags automatically, Solve this problem. Now this problem is rising too much. Now, when we choose a song every time, it shows adds. Literally in every thing, it shows adds. I'm tired of this app. Continuous choosing songs will not allow you to choose again. skipping the song is not allowed without premium. Downloading songs is not allowed. all features requires premium. JUST USELESS APP
author: BHUVAN DEVADA

text: It's great that an app exists which gives you healing for nothing...any kinda song I wanna listen, I can have it and even download it for free(on Spotify) Premium contains more wonderful features like : you can download the songs and listen it even when you're offline! Also, to experience and get a perfect idea about Spotify premium, you can use it free for three months at a stretch! So go now and just have it an enjoy!❤️🫶🏻
author: Resmin Akter

text: I don't like this app at all because in this app we can't even download songs from the playlist. If we want to download songs, we have to pay 99 rupees for three months. And if we have not recharge or Even though we have exhausted our daily data quota, we are unable to download songs.That's why I gave this app only one star. I wanted to give this app only half a star, but I couldn't.
author: Prish Odedara

text: An app with premium advantages is FINE. NOT when you start taking the MOST BASIC things away and putting them behind that same pay wall (forcing us to listen on shuffle, now?). At this point, just make the app itself cost money. Genuinely converting to soundcloud after this. After checking it out, I recommend soundcloud. You can link Spotify to save so much time to get all your songs on there and you have so much more freedom as a free user.
author: Poser

text: When I go back to listening to a podcast, it often starts playing 15 minutes or thereabouts earlier than where I stopped listening before. Again after a break, it will start playing something completely different from what I was listening to. E.g. starts playing music rather than the podcast I was listening to. These behaviours are really annoying.
author: David Middleton

text: Spotify reigns as one of the most legendary music apps out there. I've used it for about 2 years now and I've never had a problem with it. I Really like that it shows you how many streams each song every artist has. I also really like that it saves your Playlist so you don't have to search for the album or song every time. Too much advertising tho. Really good music app in general 👍
author: Yamen Izmeqna

text: Why is Spotify no longer working with the Chromecast audio? I have tried all the things including reinstalling it twice, rebooting my phone, rebooting the Chromecast audio and clearing cache. None of that is working. It also really bugs me that when the developer comments you cannot reply to them. It would make it easier if we could reply to you directly. I'm sure I'm not the only one having this issue.
author: Lizzie Violet

text: Buggy app, requires stronger internet signal than most video streaming sites despite only streaming audio, very poor interface in terms of finding new music, repeats songs back to you on song radio. Would avoid if I wasn't already so committed. edit: thank you for offering non-personalised options for playlists, step in the right direction
author: Davvo101

text: Spotify is getting really annoying now. The app keeps forcing users to buy Premium by making the free version almost useless. We can’t properly play the songs we want, can’t freely skip or go back to previous tracks, and there are too many restrictions now. Spotify used to be fun, but now it just feels like a nonstop Premium advertisement.
author: Sandhya Kushwaha

text: It's the best music app I have used there are little adds so it doesn't get annoying it's also incredibly easy too use. I find that it helps you discover new music and songs which is also amazing especially as it can get boring listening to the same song over and over. My whole family uses Spotify as we all find the app overall amazing and easy. We are always blasting music 🫶🎶🎵
author: Amanda Law

text: Gets worse with every update, not sure how it is for premium users but it's awful for free users, constantly taking features that were free and locking them behind a paywall, thats lyrics gone now, can't select songs from albums only curated playlists, nightmare trying to preview songs, put me off ever paying for their service, youtube music is better in almost every way. 16/6/26 app doesnt work at all now, pure garbage.
author: Andrew Simpson (Andrew Simpson)

text: Slow at first, not working in the end The app was insanely slow for weeks. With the new phone I expected it to improve, but it stayed the same. Finding or playing a song, even opening the app took minutes. No downloaded media, but still tried clearing cache. This nothing, neither did deleting and installing, or clean reinstall, the app won't work as it should. Only change so far after the clean reinstall, the app won't connect or boot up at all...
author: Chris

text: I wish in Daly Mix and Discover Weekly it could give a mixed suggestion of English songs and Japanese songs, and not only giving one or the other. The app itself is good for music. But the new features are not so great, rather annoying almost. All those videos really feel unnecessary on a music app. Especially when a lot of videos are small kid bait trash. Not to add the fact I once played one podcast by mistake and now it won't stop recommending new episodes. The Premium price seems reasonable
author: Ender Dragon

text: Having paid a significant amount to Spotify over time, I'm disappointed that the app still seems to have trouble working over a home wifi network, even when other devices work, including for Spotify on those devices. Spotify said they fixed this over a year back and the problem has only been getting worse, even after a clean install.
author: Matthew Gerrits

text: lately the app is really lacking. It doesn't find my WiFi devices for casting, while other apps have no problem finding them. also it just stops making sound all of the sudden while still showing that a song is playing. and it randomly skips songs or says that I'm offline when clearly I'm not. I have already done a clean re-install, but doesn't do a thing
author: Sacha Richters

text: The only reason why I still use Spotify is because of wrapped. If YT music had it, I would've switched to it like a year ago. The free Spotify experience is getting worse day by day. It's so unfair that free users can't even skip their songs, jump to a timeline or EVEN PLAY THE SONG THEY LOVE after playing a few songs outside from a playlist or album! THIS IS RIDICULOUS. Write this down Spotify, people are switching to YT Music all of a sudden. You are disappointing us...
author: Bruce Wayne

text: I love the app, generally speaking. however, the absolute BS that is shuffle is ruining the app. You play a song that's been stuck in your head, but you don't like what it shuffled? too bad. you're stuck with it. reset the app? We saved your shuffle. Change songs? Same shuffle. The reshuffle button shows the same shuffle over and over. This one design choice has nearly made me uninstall the app numerous times. I don't know what I wanna listen to next, but it's not music from a different genre.
author: Christopher Walker

text: usually good but sometimes recently it freezes and makes my phone restart, not completely power down but restart the wallpaper and apps. also lately it's just been crashing saying there's a bug, I've cleared cache and data and did a complete clean reinstall twice, it's still doing it. I'm hoping this is going to be patched or something cuz idk what to do
author: Raikou Wolf

text: The perfect listening app for multitasking. without the subscription the advertisements are nicely and evenly placed, not too annoying, yet tolerable. the related song suggestions help find songs that fit your taste and show you something knew. the end of the year wrap is always my highlight, I love learning the songs I loved most in the year. though not all songs from other applications are on it, that's due to the songs artists.
author: Keara-lee Rosenkranz

text: I have used Spotify for years, and the price just keeps going up. The free version is absolutely terrible, limited skips, excessive amount of ads, and my music pauses every time I switch apps. Now that the monthly fee is the same price as YouTube Premium, why would I pay for just music when I can get all the same playlists on YT music and also get no ads for YT videos? I probably won't use Spotify anymore unless it goes back down to $8/month.
author: Lucas Moran (Boberton7)

text: Spotify is an amazing music app with a huge collection of songs, podcasts, and playlists. The interface is easy to use, and the personalized recommendations help me discover new music every day. I especially love the curated playlists and the ability to listen across different devices. Overall, Spotify provides a great listening experience and is one of the best music streaming platforms available. Highly recommended!
author: Aditya Patil

text: Keeps telling me I'm offline whenever I open the app and I sometimes have to wait up to 5 minutes before I can actually start using it because it won't go online even though I'm connected to WiFi. I have met others with the same issue. Other than that there's the usual what with the insane terms of service, stealing people's work, not paying the artists properly and promoting AI garbage.
author: Harry Oswald Chisholm

text: Almost not worth it Even though I pay from Premium, podcasts have ads. The recommendation system has become worse over the years. There are videos on the home page when I open it, and play automatically. I wanted this to be a music player, not another social disaster. Also the WearOS version is kind of too hard on the watch. Optimize your code instead of spending billions on AI. Thanks. My 16 year old iPod Nano runs better than this horrible junk a hunk.
author: Ákos Jandovics

text: I can't even select the music I wanna hear. Only if I pay for the premium I can select my favourite songs. Bro, I get it you guys are leading, but that doesn't mean you can do this kind of filthy move on users. Yes I agree that the app is super, awesome. You did a great job on optimising the app and providing a lot of features in the app. But please show some decency. Yes, I am using a free account, I'll hear the ads, but brother let me choose my music. Show some decency.
author: Aromal Dev Jb

text: Best music streaming out there 🎧 I’ve tried a few other platforms, but I always come back to Spotify. The interface is smooth, search works great, and the personalized playlists (like Discover Weekly and Daily Mixes) are actually good — not just random filler. Offline downloads work reliably, which is a lifesaver for commutes or when data is spotty. Podcast integration is seamless too.
author: Philip Aladino

text: What in the widget is going on? New widget forced on us. Rarely works or simply doesn't. Over sized, missing controls. Love how devs introduce feature 'enhancements' to justify their roles when they've clearly done no research. If you're looking for ways to impede my music listening and force me onto other platforms, you're doing a great job. It's not like Android is your biggest platform either by some distance.
author: Keith Phillips

text: I have the premium family package and the recent ios update has absolutely ruined the experience. It is so cluttered and annoying. It is also crashing, no volume when the song is playing. And this promoting podcasts for an extra expense is bad form. Very disappointed and seriously considering looking for an alternative.
author: bridget hannan

text: for last year it's just getting worst and worst - developers are destroying the app. new widget works time to time, only the big one is available - not the small one. Option to move data storage disappeared, date marks for favourite songs are gone - what is happening ?? what are you paid for ? sometimes it takes few tries to get the app working.
author: Jan Kratochvil

text: I’m really disappointed with the app experience. When listening to songs from a specific movie/album, shuffle is forced or limited, and basic controls are restricted unless we pay. This doesn’t feel user-friendly. On top of that, the number of ads has increased significantly—sometimes 4–6 ads during playback (Like indian serial and movies on TV) which makes the app very frustrating to use. It feels more like a spam experience than a music app.
author: Karthik. havralu

text: I installed Spotify only for BTS but Spotify is honestly frustrating to use. The number of ads is ridiculous after every two songs, I’m forced to listen to 2–3 ads. It completely destroys the listening experience.The playlist system is even worse, When I play a BTS playlist, after just 2–3 songs, it starts playing completely different artists. That defeats the whole purpose of a playlist. If I select a playlist, I expect songs from that playlist only, not random tracks I didn’t ask for.
author: Shreya Shahare

text: Thank you for bricking the old widget, which worked perfectly fine, in an effort to force me to replace it with a new widget that is practically identical except it doesn't work 75% of the time. Back when Spotify was much cheaper and primarily designed for listening to music, I always found myself wishing it would be redesigned every other month for no apparent reason other than to increasingly focus on force-feeding me AI slop.
author: Russell Harrison

text: Spotify is absolutely broken. Constant lag, endless freezes, random glitches, and tracks changing by themselves in the middle of a song. The app stutters, slows down the entire system, and feels completely unoptimized, even on a powerful computer. Songs disappear, playlists get messed up, and nothing works the way it should. This is not a premium experience, it’s frustrating garbage. One of the worst-performing apps I’ve used. Fix your damn software.
author: Ion Turcan

text: Spotify is literally forcing people to get premium, you can't seek forward in a track, you can't rewind back, you can't skip to the next song, you can't go back to the last song and after every 2 songs you have to listen to 1 min of ads. You have to listen to ads when you search for a song. It has become the worst music app in the market. Now you can only play 5 songs a day directly by tapping on it
author: Yash Kumar

text: absolutely brilliant app for music, by far the best. Especially for discovering new music and the customer service is superb too. orginally had no hopes of getting anywhere by following through with the reply on my review but I was wrong and the issue was resolved in 5 minutes. If anybody is wondering how to stop your playlists playing the same set? just delete cache and it'll work again. also worth mentioning that the premium price is worth it.
author: John malkovich

text: Gets worse with every version. Trying to be an "all in one" system that's lost it's way in terms of actually being a streaming music player. The new interface is awful and it flicks and flashes when doing thinga, it feels much more like some bad webapp than something actually polished. The login process is particularly horrid. I only have premium for other half and kids, I've not even used it since they axed Spotify lite (which was that reliable no-fuss music player this fails at)
author: Ant Last

text: so, the app is now very appealing, especially throughout the updates, but, sometimes, the amount of choose-to-play mechanic always gives me the gloom when it runs out, but, it felt like they've increased the choose-to-play counts? but some of the lyrics are sometimes not there, so I have to find alternative sources to read lyrics (I also changed my review from 2 -> 5⭐ after years later :0 )
author: Fluxy Fonixciry

text: I have used Spotify for some years and only recently have I had a problem. The app has began opening up with a blank screen without any visible way of accessing a single menu. I have tried everything from closing and reopening to deleting cashe data to hard uninstall/reinstall which will work for a bit then the same issues arise once more.. must have uninstalled 15 times only for it to happen again. This is very frustrating and I feel like jumping ship.
author: Philip Dower

text: Free version is unusable. if you think I'm gonna sit through THREE whole one minute plus ads every other song you're out of your damn mind. The free version used to be a good tradeoff back when it was an ad every once in a while, but I guess the ceo and board need their 17th yacht so we get to enjoy more ads than music
author: leo sky

text: From the best music app to the worse. 6 skips per HOUR, cant turn off shuffle (premium), rarely able to choose the song you want (premium), sometimes you get forced to watch 4 ADS and the bad thing is that if youre trying to find a new song to listen to and skipping mindlessly, youll be bombed with ads. Miss it when apps were actual apps and not money grabbers. Giving it 2 stars because over the years I have made a lot of playlists and they're important to me.
author: tsetska stoynova

text: first it was amazing, but without selling your whole lunge it's no fun anymore! to listen to books and or special podcasts you have to extra pay and the abo just for music is much! the app keeps on lagging and starting itself too! also not every song has lyrics and is on the app! it was fun, and it's still okay, but the constant dropping of quality and high costing makes it hard to enjoy the app I feel like I'm paying more and more for less and less in return!

text: I would love if Spotify Canada had a subscription plan that did not allow downloads but cut out commercials. I will never download music if my life depended on it. It has never been part of my routine. There should be at least 3 tiers Spotify can offer for subscriptions that cut commercials. Not everyone needs everything offered in the subscription price, but any level of paid subscription should cut commercials. This alone would allow me to give 5 stars.

text: This is honestly unfair, Spotify. You gotten WAY to greedy. As a person who used Spotify a way back now, I missed when you are less greedy. but now you are money hungry, like what you mean I have to pay premium just to use shuffle mode?!. I can't even replay or skip forward when music playing. (and some devices there a limit for listening just a song) Plus theres alot of adds that started to piss me off that I need to move to a different and better music app, BRING BACK OLD SPOTIFY!!!

text: Before they weren't forcing us to take their Premium plan but now they're forcing that you can't play the song of your own choice. They're saying that you'll only be able to listen the songs of your own choice only if you take the Premium. After 6 months I opened and it played nice but again pop ups Two faced app I recommend not to use the app They've turned mongrels as they're running behind me to pay the premium and that too after listening for only 30 mins
author: Bibhash Varun

text: 0 stars. Want the basic individual with no audio books? Can't have it, tim Apple's music has it tho. 10.99 CAD, that's $2 a month less than the lowest thing spotify offers. I've been using apple music which sucks but it's better than this, the features aren't being messed around with constantly to integrate psychotic AI stuff.
author: Jeremy Delazzer

text: Previous stability issues have been fixed, but the current version of the app is so frustrating to use. For a start, swiping to the next track works 2 out of 5 times, with the other 3 occasions being confused for a swipe down. Then there's the new way to add songs to a playlist, with the pop up vanishing and then returning to create mis-taps. I'm also sick of being hounded about Spotify Family. I'm starting to consider moving away from Spotify altogether
author: Joseph Stevenson

text: I’m really annoyed with the number of ads on Spotify lately. It feels like after every few songs there’s another interruption, and sometimes the ads are even louder than the music itself. I understand free users need ads, but the frequency has become too much and it ruins the listening experience. It makes enjoying music frustrating instead of relaxing. If you really did this again all the users should delete you app and they will switch other app. So be responsible.
author: Rahul Karthy

text: ever since the new year the app has become ever so slow. Try to find a song? Shows me my recent searches instead , once the actual song i try to find loads up i click on it to play it just for the app to crash. Try to skip a song? I can't because it's suddenly slow. Try to change songs on different playlists? can't because it's too slow. try to add a song to a playlist? CAN'T CAUSE IT'S TOO SLOW
author: Anette

text: Frustratingly often Spotify does not contain dance singles that are on the market elsewhere. The other day I lost music I had searched for and stored away when Spotify decided to shorten my list of tunes to play. There's now no way now of recovering the songs I had dug out to listen to. Spotify is a great idea with a lot that still needs to be worked on. They don't pay contributing artists enough and it's an increasingly expensive platform for the general public to make use of.
author: Anthony Parker

text: I've used Spotify for over a decade. for the first time having major problems with the app. Keeps saying I'm offline when I'm not (as all other online features in other apps working flawlessly) uninstalled it as per recommendations on this thread - reinstalled it which it completed then as soon as I open the app it says "something went wrong, check your connection and try again". the audacity after it successfully downloaded the app online... Any ideas Spotify team? I use this app daily!
author: R W

text: Just be a premium user if you want to enjoy, besides, fix the shuffle problem, even in a huge playlist of more than 1000 songs I usually hear the same group of songs Everytime I put it on shuffle. You need to add good animations and clean designs, the UI is kinda lacking. Give us an option to restore deleted liked songs to their original position, because it's so easy to mistakenly delete one, work on that, add a confirmation message for deletion.
author: Enoch Folarin

text: I've been a loyal subscriber to Spotify premium for closer to a decade now & I can confidently tell you with personal past experience with both types of versions, premium is THE ONLY WAY to go. Sometimes it might seem like it's a bit expensive but depending on how often you're using it (for me I get more than my money's worth each month) it's a way better experience compared to the free, ad infested version with unskippable songs. 10/10 recommend the premium Spotify for sure!
author: Jestine Garneau

text: Was amazing at the beggining (11 years ago) then became more and more unusable in the last years, became really bad this last year. So bad, in fact, that I switched to another plateform. The algorithm only recommends me the same tracks over and over again with some new ones once in a while.. It also recommends me with a lot of podcasts I do not want to see, audiobooks I can't listen to or music in genres I never listen to either. Overall very disappointed with my recent experience.
author: Cloé

text: Songs variety & sound quality are awesome. But I am irritated by the app automatically playing on when Bluetooth earphones are on or when kept aside, it plays loudly. I have a habit of late night listening to podcasts & when I put down my earphones; Spotify automatically plays on in full volume, waking up my wife & kid. Tried switching off autopsy mode but didn't work. Will look for a solution & if didn't found any, would uninstall the app. I dont want any such application on my phone...
author: Jasmeet Kohli

text: Spotify treats the people who have no premium, like absolute trash. Right after I put 1 song I get 3 ads. And I can't even choose which song I want to listen to not in the same queue as I have in the playlist. No words can define how much I despise this app. It treats the free users so badly as if we don't deserve to listen to music. Like 1 ad per 4-5 hours is fine but they make it theirs life's mission to make sure that you only get ads. Even if there is shuffle it keeps on repeating the same.
author: jakespinkyring

text: The WORST music app EVER! This app is just a money grabbing, greedy, and ad paradise! The ads are so frequent that I can't even listen to music. Now you're telling me I can't have two device on the same account?? I HAVE MULTIPLE GADGETS. This app is nothing but a waste of time. The premium isn't even worth it! Smart shuffle?? I want to play my own playlist and you keep interrupting me with songs I don't like! WORST MUSIC APP EVER. Find a new app folks, this one is just plain trash!
author: lhuwer

text: Very irritating issue. Cannot change the music, cannot select any favourite music and cannot listen to anypart of the song. They just allow us to hear the music they would play from a playlist that we select. Cannot select any music. This is a very bad experience from Spotify. With all these issue why do we need this app? Very trash experience. Free plan is now garbage.
author: Anupama Augustine

text: As someone that spends money for a subscription, I believe that it's really a great app with great forms of connectivity with others, and continues to improve and add good updates and additions that really help it's users have a great time. however, the same can't be said with those who can't pay for a subscription. It plays too much adds, and the user's choice of the songs they want to play are limited.
author: Weswes Angelio

text: great music streaming app but I have a few annoying inconveniences I keep experiencing.Downloading offline audio tracks is supposed to allow me to listen to music without an internet connection, but no I can't do that with some of the songs and why isn't there an option for stop at end of playlist for the sleep timer? It's really annoying because these are the key features i look for in an audio player
author: Lebohang Makubo

text: I hate this app so much, worst money I have ever didn't on a subscription. I wouldn't recommend paying for it if you like listening to podcasts because you will get MULTIPLE ads during every single one, I always get at least 6 for a 45 minute podcast and now it won't connect to my internet, but I can use every other internet app just fine. I HATE THIS APP! GARBAGE!!!
author: Airielle Archer

text: It has all the songs I like but the user interface has gotten worse over the years. This filter system is probably meant for another workflow than what I have. Also they moved the "Add to queue" button further down the list when you right click. Apparently people listen to new songs all the time that they want to add to playlists right away rather than just queue songs they want to hear next
author: Rickard Lundholm

text: I like it, I'm a user since 2022, it's all good until it got greedy, wdym I have to listen to 3 ADS a time? are you serious? can't even choose a song freely without those bs appearing, one song and three ads? it's honestly annoying, many people can't afford the Spotify premium, but the app is good. it's just you need to pay money for basic things.
author: zaika

text: 8 year Spotify Premium user here with 1,190 liked songs. Despite using shuffle, fewer repeats, clearing cache, and turning off Automix, Spotify keeps playing the same small group of songs over and over. Shuffle doesn't feel random and much of my library rarely gets played. The music catalog is great, but the repetitive algorithm is making me consider switching to another service. Please add a true random shuffle option. I really don't like the algorithm approach.
author: Jess

text: I'm rating it a 3 bcuz atp it's just asking for us to buy premium. like when I started using this app, it let me have my songs repeatedly, and let's me listen unlimitedly. but now... it doesn't let you repeat the songs, and you get to pick only a few songs before it doesn't let you pick. it's really annoying and it keeps begging for us to get premium. text: I would recommend Spotify to everyone. I pay for the service for no interruptions. It offers me to place my favorites in a folder, so I can play it all day long and never want to skip a song I dislike. I love the feature of adding one song into the folder and not the entire album. Being able to download so they will play offline is incredible. There are so many genres available, that my favorite playlist is very eclectic. The price for the no interruptions is well worth it.

text: Yes, there are other options out there, but I found Spotify to be the most consistent. Does it have everything I've ever wanted to listen to? No. But I have more than enough to keep me occupied. Not to mention the incredible amount of Podcasts. You like music or podcasts? Buy the premium. Make sure you support your fave artists or podcasts by buying their merch. Its worth it.
author: Canvas 35

text: Better than Pandora. I have been using Spotify for several years. I don't even remember when I started using it. I had Spotify for free for a few years, got tired of the ads and tried premium off and on, going back to the free plan for several months. I finally decided to stay with premium. There is definitely more I can do on the premium plan compared to the free plan. I've been paying for premium for 2 or 3 years and so far enjoying it. no complaints.

What I'm missing is a way to tell Spotify: "I like this song and want more recommendations like it, but I don't want to save it to my library." The curr

Happy listening!

TRY SPOTIFY AND IT WON'T DISAPPOINT YOU ❤️❤️😘🫶👌

text: I have a black screen when I try to go into the app, what do I need to do? Thank you for replying. I restarted my phone, for a second time and it worked. I changed the rating back to 5 stars

text: my favorite music app for over a decade! a happy customer! I love being able to listen to entire albums, make playlists, and most recently I'm super enjoying the AI DJ X, which usually is spot on for my music taste!

text: Well worth the subscription. Simple and beautiful interface, never glitches, lyrics right there, almost any song you can think of is there, you can create as many playlists as you'd like, share your playlists, you can even save your playlists for offline listening. I couldn't ask for any more of a music app. 🔥👌
author: Yolisa Msomi

text: Without a doubt the best music streaming app around. Helped me through some of the toughest moments keeping the music running at high quality, speed & always supplied my dopamine hit with its endless range of amazing artists and songs. 👽 👾 💙 ❤️
author: Christian William

text: Spotify is one of the best music apps as long as ads don't bother you, I'm fine with them. but besides that it shows you lyrics for practically every song, I love how easy it is to navigate and organize and it lets you listen to new music easily with recommendations and I love Spotify wrapped it was very interesting to see at the end of the year.

text: Spotify is absolutely top rate when it comes to streaming all genres of music. And as far as prices go, you can't beat the quality & pricing that you get at Spotify. I refuse to use anything but Spotify !!!!!

text: A very good app. Say goodbye, YouTube music! I can finally freely create my own mix! The only part I don't really like is that there can only be 1 e-mail per account. You can't sign in to multiple accounts with 1 e-mail. I know it's security, but still a bit annoying. Other than that, a really good app. The adds aren't that bad either. Their short so it won't take forever like YouTube. Good app, just stop making my algorithm only the creators I selected lol.
author: Desi Taylor

text: I love spotify,Ive used it for so long. if you listen to 9+ hrs of music a week, you need to get this and get the premium, because it is worth it! They have lyrics, music videos, podcasts, audio books, family plans, they also let you mix playkists, and you have a always available customized DJ who plays you songs when you dont know what to play. they have good listening stats and end of year stats. They also have music videos now which is awesome! also, college students get super cheap plans!🫶

text: I had a very good experience with spotify I can hear songs of my ideas whithout paying and add free it runes reliably whithout crashing I loved this app as I can also find lyrics of of almost all songs they give us categories and show songs as per interest i loved this application soo much you should surly try it ❤️
author: Suren Sikar

text: Spotify offers an outstanding music streaming experience with an extensive library of songs, podcasts, and playlists. The personalized recommendations are highly accurate, making it easy to discover new content.
author: izzul sado

text: Spotify excels with its **unmatched personalization** and seamless interface. Algorithms like Discover Weekly and Daylist pinpoint your taste perfectly, making music discovery effortless. The app's cross-device continuity allows you to switch from phone to speaker without missing a beat. With a massive library of podcasts and audiobooks alongside high-quality streaming, it is the ultimate all-in-one audio hub for any mood.
author: Dontrell

text: I've been using Spotify for years now and love the music, audio books and podcasts. I do wish there were more hours of audio book time so I've added the extra hours purchase option. I wish the charges for extra audio books hours was less too but I'm very happy with this app!! completely worth the money for premium.

text: I absolutely love Spotify!! They even give you time to pay in these hard times. I will never switch. I will be paying Friday by the way 😆😆. Great music and app even books and podcasts. Thanks Spotify!

text: Spotify is simply the best music app out there. Huge song library, perfect playlists, and the sound quality is amazing. The Discover Weekly never misses. Can’t imagine my day without it!

text: This is the best music app I have ever used. This can immediately change mood 😉. with this also came to know my friend's personality (amused, broken ,rocker, chill) . Actually the main thing is that you don't have to change the song at all and still it continues till you don't stop it. thanks spoty 🥴.

text: Spotify is the true definition of right place right time. The App is truly remarkable and then premium is very negotiable. Best recommendation for music,prodcast and audio books. Thanks to the team We truly appreciate you. Spotify is the right place to be Trust me ✌️
author: Zumira Mishti

text: EDIT, June 2026: Spotify, since the last update I have, has been the best that it's ever been! Thank you (finally)! Thanks again, Spotify devs! Great overall improvement!
author: Puna Xaypanya

text: guys the paid version is better than the free version. it adds plays other recommendations that I didn't ask for to the songs I search. it has a timeskip thing whereby when u have passed the timeskip limit they start choosing songs for. I like the app but u can do better and please remove the timeskip thing. But overall its good app with its flaws
author: Siphesihle Pearl Radebe

text: It's definitely much better than Youtube Music, that's for sure. I like how expansive the app is and how much content and community it can have at times. Although some basic features are locked behind Premium.. its really not that bad for a free app!
author: Phi

text: Spotify has been my go-to music app for years, and it only gets better. The personalized recommendation algorithm is unmatched—features like Discover Weekly, Daily Mixes, and the annual Wrapped release constantly introduce me to incredible new music tailored exactly to my taste.The app's cross-device connectivity is completely flawless. I can seamlessly switch my audio from my phone to my laptop, smart TV, or gaming console without missing a single beat.
author: shoba Devi

text: Awesome! I love Spotify so much because I love music. I have been using Spotify premium for a very long time. I use premium because I really like to choose what I listen to. I don't like someone choosing music for me. But somehow my lists always gets stuck on shuffle so it's still tries to choose from that playlist but you can choose an override anything that starts to play with premium.
author: Tory

text: This is the only app that i use to play music on all my devices. But the level of ads is way too much.... I understand that you can take full control of your music only when you join Spotify premium. But the way you guys que up these ads like you're the ones that purchase data for me to use and listen to your ads. An ad is enough...but 3 to 4 ads at once, THAT IS WAY TOO MUCH SPOTIFY 😡😡😡😡
author: Ndella Julius

text: YUPP Spotify over any music app. It has so many features and works so much better than it did a couple years ago. This is THE music app. You can blend playlist which is just creating playlist w your friends, there's a smart shuffle which is when your listening to music and it puts similar songs in your queue so you can get introduced to new mucic. There are daylist, and these are playlist that change thought the day depending on what your listening to. I can say so much more spokes person me!!
author: Jazmine Layne

text: it's the only subscription I pay for, so worth it. I love the variety of music and it also got me into various podcasts, about raising kids, home renovation and motivational/self help. It's helpful for kids nursery rhymes in the car too. I occasionally use the DJ function, or the playlists it makes for me, and the addition of smart shuffle on my own playlists has helped me get some new music.
author: Jazmyn ʕ•ع•ʔ

text: When I switched over from YT Music I was astonished about how good this app was. Sure if you don't buy the premium subscription you get ads and limited skips, but that's not terrible. on the other hand it does expend quite a bit of battery but it is a free app so I would recommend trying it out.
author: Oscar Lyddall-smith

text: it is pretty good. you can listen to various music and follow different artists. but, I think a little change in the app would be more better. actually, there should be an option of restoring your data after uninstalling the app and downloading it again. please look forward to it. thanks.
author: Rajinder Kaur

text: Love it we are on the family plan. It is fantastic everybody gets their own music for one decent price a month. I get to search and make up playlist and so far I haven't hit the limit of how many playlists you can have I don't know if they have a limit on it lol. My favorite part is that I just learned how to search my playlist for a very specific songs
author: Mariah Shakur

text: Not gonna lie, Spotify is really good. But some features are only for premium members. So, I think you could change it and others who don't have a premium can enjoy the features too. Just a thought,btw. Over all, I'll always rate Spotify ∞/10💓
author: Aradhya Chowdhury

text: Spotify over Pandora. And 100% worth buying a subscription. If you truly are a music fan, Spotify is the way to go. If you just want whatever popular music to play on random, and often get weird "similar" music recommendations, Pandora is for you. How is AC/DC recommend after listening to Electric Wizard? I guess if it's generally labeled as "rock"...I guess? With Spotify, recommendations actually make sense, and it's easy to use. Making playlists is easy and convenient. & tons of obscure music!
author: Zeina Hanna

text: I love Spotify! Although I hate the ads, even though they are short, the recommendations they give mr are great. I love that I can listen to a varity of music styles over and over again without paying a single penny. I really hope this app stays the same and doesnt add unnesacery or bad updates!
author: Daniela Arroyo

text: I have used spotify for 3 years now and a LOT has changed. our lyrics have changed their looks, we've gotten lossless music. with apple being their biggest competitor they do a lot that apple still doesn't. we have to give the devs a LOT of credit for even making a free tier compared to apple. plus spotify has the most reliability when using it cross devices compared to apple where its better to use their phones, ipads, or macs. thank you devs for your hard work and keep it up ✌️
author: Carson Andres

text: I recently installed Spotify and found the setup process quick and user-friendly. The app offers a clean interface, personalized music recommendations, curated playlists, podcasts, and seamless syncing across devices. Audio quality is solid, and discovering new music is easy thanks to its recommendation engine.
author: Ritu Sen

text: If this helps anyone out if Spotify thinks your suddenly in another country keep uninstalling reinstalling and restarting your phone worked for me. I also had an issue playing music over Bluetooth but it was the phone's fault. Make sure to uncheck "remove permissions and free up space" within your phone setting if you use Bluetooth to play music. I spent 3 hours looking for solutions online and that's all it was.
author: Andrew Rossi

text: Surpassing Amazon's inflexible music control, led me to find a different way to hear my music... Spotify is excellent (+ with Premium Acct) to access so much music and other media that it is much more enjoyable, satisfying method of listening. I'm grateful for the free trial of premium and the platform.
author: Chloe Black

text: [Positive]: 1. GREAT app for listening song with high quality. 2. Without premium, you can listen to music for few hours in 24h, you can't switch other songs after. [Negative]: 1. There is no video for some songs(I gave a try to the premium option). 2. It would be nice if we listen song together with ppl faraway from my home.. like, with my friends(I tried premium for this, but the other person in the Jam must also use premium for it. Or else, we can't listen together. It's a bit disappointing).
author: K.Prasanna

text: absolutely awesome! i love the community, the songs, and the playlists! it's awesome! I'd pick this anytime.🪷*hands up* you do have to pay for unlimited skips and stuff like that, other than that it's okay, I didn't pay so I have only 6 skips. 👍🏾

text: Music has been there for me in every mood — late-night overthinking, happy moments, silence, and chaos. Some songs became memories, and some memories became songs. Spotify is not just an app anymore, it’s like a collection of feelings I never knew how to explain.
author: Prince Kumar

text: I love music. Spotify is a great app for anyone who want to listen to music from favorite artists with the option to create playlists. Spotify announces concerts and even has merch available on the app. Spotify even has sounds of nature available on the app and other instrumentals, including classical music. Spotify has all types of genres and artists available to listen to. Premium Spotify is worth every cent for anyone who doesn't want to listen to the advertisements. I love Spotify.
author: Kilsy

text: Amazing! this app is amazing for if you wanna play background sound or just music, playlists, podcasts, and so much more. there are some ads between songs if you don't have premium, but it's worth the sacrifice. all in all, I do recommend!
author: Kate !!!! :3

text: Spotify has nice sound, a proper search engine and suggested songs. I suggest that the way the lyrics appear while listening to music can be done for when screen is locked while tuning in, the process will be the best feature they would have produced. 🔥🔥🔥
author: Thami Mkhize

text: I m on premium sub. My offline access button always switch back off, doesnt matter how many times I switch it on. My download button doesnt show. I ve delete cache, delete all data, uninstall-reinstall. None of those resolve the problem. After few days I got email notification that spotify now has download feature, since I can download my playlist again as before without updating nor do anything with the app. Not sure if it s a bug or sthing, but it s resolved.
author: Avelri Faqila

text: Honestly, Spotify is an absolute menace to my productivity, and I’m completely fine with that. The 'Discover Weekly' and daily mixes hit so close to my actual mood it’s almost creepy—like the app is reading my mind after a bad day. The UI is slick, creating playlists is dangerously addictive, and the seamless handoff between my phone, laptop, and smart speakers is flawless. If you aren't on Premium yet, you're missing out on pure, uninterrupted dopamine. 10/10, no notes.
author: Nihal G

text: As someone who has been using this app since 2012 it is well worth it. The dj makes it the best part as it creates a radio setup just based on what you listen to and recommends new artists. the fact that I can also make and share Playlist with friends makes it so amazing. got one Playlist with 7000 songs so yea love the customization.

text: Spotify Great app for music lovers. The recommendations are always on point and it’s easy to discover new songs and artists. Smooth interface and works well even on low data. Overall, very convenient for everyday listening.

text: Love Spotify! The music recommendations are always on point, and there's a playlist for literally every mood. I use it daily and it never gets boring. Easy to use, great sound quality, and a huge library of songs. Couldn't ask for more!

text: so satisfying 😅 I must say that whenever I'm in bad mood, i open Spotify and listen to my favourite songs for healing..🤌🏻 Really, this app made my mood bad to happy 😺 sometimes sad songs and sometimes my mood generes... sometimes I want to listen some old songs and i doubt that can I find them on Spotify and really i find them and after listening to music 🎶 i just feel so happy and relaxed 😌 because sometimes music is just not about enjoying or listening 🎧, it is like a music therapy. 🩷

text: When I was in between jobs I had many subscriptions cancel on me. I couldn't make the payments but Spotify stuck with me. Thank you so much Spotify I will never leave you.

text: I love that I can listen to all my favorite songs, podcasts and even books. Makes traveling great and nice to have while on a picnic or the beach. I've had a lot of friends download the app as while.

I recommend this app for music!
author: Ray Roark (Rambillie)

text: a great use for a student like me who loves listening while studying or even on our vacant, been using this for 2yrs alr so I think its finally THAT time to give this a good review since I'm benefiting on it not just on listening but mentally–this is all I had when no one's there for me. Living in Baguio without anyone to be with is so depressing–luckily Spotify's there to accompany me all throughout my emotions weither I'm sad, happy or even gloomed. I'm happy to use this app🤍

text: Spotify has music 🎶 for everyone great classics. I was listening to Spotify the music is crystal clear 👌 on many devices. who needs the cd player. when Spotify provides great sounds. and lots to listen too when ever you want to use this service : )

text: I wish I could give you guys a 5 star review but I don't like how you can't reverse to the last song you played without premium, you can't skip songs more than 6 times without premium, and now, all of a sudden it's a limit on lyrics?! That's just unacceptable.. I can't believe that you guys would do that.
author: alyanna

text: Great music app. So many playlists for any mood and day and season. The premium offerings definitely worth it. Personally my go to music app, maybe even my lifetime entertainment and personal solace app😊😊.

text: One of the only free radio stations that actually play an artist solely when you ask them to. I sometimes want to hear just one artist, not a station made with similar artists. Imagine you want just Rush, or just ccr, on Spotify they make that happen, and other stations will just play a couple songs of the artist you requested, followed by others when you desired just music from the era, but not the same. That means a lot to me as a consumer, I think I'll subscribe for that reason. thanks!!
author: Dana Steinheimer

text: As a longtime user for almost a decade now, Spotify has simply become one of my life's QoL upgrades. Its intuitive design for organizing music (playlists, liked songs, recommendations, etc.) is unmatched. +You never get bored of the yearly wrapped, it's fun!

text: This music App is Fire 🔥, it knows the best recommended songs to follow up, and it has everything you need, it's the perfect music app especially when you're subscribed. The app gives you premium service and you don't need to stress yourself, it's everything a music app needs
author: Adimogor Augusta

text: I love the app, I mainly use the free since I am rarely home and don't mind the ads, but when I use premium, it's bliss. I love creating my own playlists, and I am happy for the opportunity. Maybe allow the broke 💔 to play music in any order tho.

text: exceptional. The variaty of artists available is awesome. though id like to have audio books more available instead of paying a seperate fee for them. maybe even lower the cost for a family subscription.

text: I just got a new device after months of just wanting to stay off, and all I could think of installing first was Spotify, then signing in afterwards. text: if you don't know what Spotify is then you should just try it anyways it's just like every other music app I've used this for years it's always been really good it's never overdrawn my cards or take payment when it wasn't supposed to yeah you only get 6 if you don't pay for it it's a free music app that is pretty cool paper is the best not that much so all those trolls out there that are making this look really shity this actually is a really nice music app

text: I love listening to music and Spotify is the place I go and it's so easy to navigate and find what I want to play. I also listen to playlists that Spotify makes me so that's good too. text: it'll always be my go to music streamer. basically making music not just sound but another emotion 😌🤞. My only suggestion is to put a music searching feature like Shazam. Spoti-find is a great name I'm suggesting. But otherwise 5 stars 😇

text: i absolutely love the day i found out about Spotify, since then no looking back. I would want to ask the team maybe they could include a feature where I can just repeat a particular part of the song i like, it'd be great.

text: its a really great app, I've been using it since about 2022-2023 and the only thing I've never liked about the.app are the ads but I've learned how to zone them out so it's not that bad. o feel like Spotify is one of the best apps ever created and I think it's for everyone, from little kids (with parental supervision) to adults because there's everything from nursery rhymes to podcasts. very awesome app
author: Julia

text: I love Spotify so much it's my pick me up /go to app when I'm making masks ,cosplays,or even just doing day to day tasks thank u Spotify for being THE best music app ever ! I also have a lot of fun making new playlists for me and my friends to jam out to on sleepovers or just hanging out! if u need to listen to music I recommend Spotify all the way!!

text: Very nice to navigate and the music organisation system to the users of the platform is great. The tool created to blend different types of music are good, but in my opinion as I heard the platform lacks in giving the right amount of recompensation to the artists, singers, musicians and people involved in the creation of music. I'm doing the 3 month trial. Seeing how it's the same price as Amazon, I'll probably keep it!!! So far I really like it. it's a lot easier to use. Very customizable. I have found a lot of songs that were not available on AM!!!! It's a much better APP!!!!

text: Amazing! I can listen to my favorite songs whenever! And I can share music! Playlists are so easy to make and the family plan is so easy to work with! As a teen who loves rock, this app is perfect. Doing homework is so much more exiting b/c I know I can sit at my desk and listen to music, podcasts, and so much more when I get home. I am so thankful for this app to make everything a click away. I very highly recommend this app to everybody.

text: 10/10 app for music! ive been using it forever and i will continue to. but something ive noticed over the past few days is that whever i click on my profile, there's the section where there is three of your playlists and then the button "see all playlists". its been glitching out so there is maybe 10+ of those on my profile, and everytime i restart the app there's more. please fix this bug!
author: Isabelle

text: Spotify is the best music app very helpful to me when I am search for the music🎶 easy to find out. I personally recommend this app it helps my mind to recover from anxiety. I daily listens to music to make my mind refreshed but one thing I does not like is ads I know how ads are important to apps to keep them alive but forcing too much ads makes us quite app and switch. after too much use of app we can't at least play our favorite song it says get premium it's very frustrating thing.devs think
author: Kuldeep M. P

text: I have had Spotify for years and bad experiences have been minimal at most. Continues to get better and improve through new features, playlists and additions. When I met my significant other who like me uses music as her therapy. I heard her listening to music as we we drive along and all of a sudden an ad came on. After asking what the hell is that? lol she responded, what? It's Pandora. That moment I logged into my account and upgraded my Spotify and added her on there. Thank you Spotify.
author: James Turner

text: It's cause they told me to. However, I wish we could pick songs that we liked all the time and it was still free. I wish that some of the other features could be payed for, but not the unlimited skips and stuff, like there can still be ads and stuff.
author: Emma Wiens

text: Spotify is hands-down the best app for discovering new artists. The personalized playlists are amazing, the UI is easy to navigate, and the lyric-syncing feature is perfect for singing along. I love being able to share playlists easily with friends. Highly recommend!
author: Chong Cho

text: Music, Podcasts, Peronalization!!! That is how I describe this app. It is amazingly customizable for most situations, vibes and asthetics of my day. I am able to change my play list to thereputic podcasts, or listen to the most amazing music!!! I was flaberghasted at the amount of music and news I didn't even know existed. Definetly a Outstanding add on my phone, game console, pc, car, home ..etc... I highly recomend over other apps and brands!!!
author: Michael Watson

text: Spotify is not perfect but it has basically everything you need for listening to music. Even though spotify free is bad, there are apps like apple music that doesn't even let you listen to songs for free and they can decide if letting you keep your playlists or not if you unsubscribe... For me this is the best app to listen to songs and music.
author: kadri24

text: I've had this app for about as long as I've had a phone! I love that I can make playlists for myself and share with others, if I want to. PLUS I can listen to some of my podcasts on here too! I wish it was easier to add whole albums with a single click, but I haven't figured that out yet (unless it's just not available). Right now I have to do it song by song. But I still love the app!
author: Tonya

text: I have been using Spotify for more than 5 Years. last year I switched from the Free to Premium version. I love Spotify for 1. Best collection 2. Highly intuitive song prediction The area below needs improvement: 1. The Forward & Backward options in Podcast is not a very smooth list like it used to be on Netflix. It's glitchy and the user interface is also not very good. 2. It keeps accumulating data in the background and overall storage usage by the application keeps incrementing!
author: Dhaval Shah

text: I love this app. All the music I want in one place. And whilst I give this 5 stars, I think the only way to enjoy this app is by premium. Try listening to a playlist without premium and you get to listen to one song on there and the next song will be a similar song, irrespective of whether you like it or not but won't be off your playlist.
author: Lee Smith

text: It has been since 2014 for me that I have been using Spotify. My favorite feature is the Jam option, which is fantastic! I need new music constantly and have hundreds of Playlists. I've use Apple Music, I started with Pandora. I have tried SoundCloud, which is also great. But Spotify is far superior and I am an avid user.
author: Kyle Bilik

text: Iv had this for 8 years and it's been a very nice journey. It's great for any time and where -update- first liked song was in 2015 now I have listened to over 300k songs last year was 75k minutes worth of music with over 5k songs played. still better then Pandora when it comes to finding songs you want to listen too. I have paid for Spotify for over 2/3s or of the time because I hate ads..
author: Matthew Moscini

text: Title: The GOAT of Music Streaming! 🎧✨ Honestly, Spotify is hands-down the best thing that ever happened to my ears. It’s a total game-changer because you can find literally everything on there—from those random underground indie tracks to the biggest hits on the planet. I’ve never searched for a song and not found it. It’s like having every record store in the world right in your pocket! 🌎🎶 It completely blows Pandora and everything else out of the water. It's just the best.
author: Emeka Anaso

text: I really love the new Spotify update. Now I can message my friends and share music directly in the app. It's much easier than sending links on other apps, and I like that I can see what my friends are listening to in real time. It makes the app feel more social
author: Danial Dlshad

text: Better than youtube music by offering free listening to music while browsing other apps. I can play a game with music without needing to pay for that feuture. But can you add looping music back to play repeatedly? By the way, I have an idea for you. If you can make an app like music maker jam or partner up with someone who made such an app. You can maker this app get more downloads. Good if it's free to listen to their own music while browsing. Check out invent help websites for patents.
author: Kyvon - - Jayza

text: Music is always correct. Never had any issues and still reliable. also the recommendations given by Spotify after listening to a favourite album have allowed me to be introduced to Artists I never new about. However the cost has gone up significantly in 5 years I have been on it. good but expensive.
author: Daniel Long

text: I love chilling out with global vibes and reading the lyrics at the same time. Whenever I have a break, I put on my headphones to discover songs from around the world. I'm always searching for apps that show real-time lyrics for international tracks. Music from different cultures is my favorite thing to listen to when I'm free.
author: Ebsa Abdi

text: Please add a place in View Song Credits for Key/Mode (ie A Major, B Minor, C Major Pentatonic, D Dorian) and Tempo (ie beats per minute BPM=120). When putting together playlists, identifying key and tempo relationships is fundamental to crafting the flow between songs. Including this info in a place where it isn't in the way but can easily be found would be appreciated. Thanks!
author: Kurtis Henderson

text: I listen to Spotify for free and it is amazing. I can listen to all my favorite songs and music artists. I love the quality and the podcast. overall a great app. you can also listen to it off of the app while playing a different game or just have your phone off.
author: Aaliyah

text: music is as important to me as water and so is Spotify. For me it has become part of my daily life. Not only can I listen to all of my favorite artists, even the unknown obscure ones that no one has heard of. I can listen to podcasts learn things and even listen to audiobooks. I love the premium features such as listening to the same song a thousand times. 😂
author: River Green

text: I love this app. It's has different categories of music. It is very easy to look up different songs from different eras from big band to modern and classical music. I was introduced to this app because my daughter who's in a band called Abyss of Bliss music is on it. I also like the audio books.
author: Pamela Carian

text: I like how fast you can create your own custom playlist and how accurate it can suggest other songs based on one added song. It would make the app much more interesting if you can change the app theme color with decent options like solid, gradient or maybe an image . It just feels nice to be able to customize the way it looks. Thoughts on this?🤔
author: Lucien Montclaire

text: Spotify just enabled playing any song first in your playlists! 5 stars. Advertising is still a little unpredictable (they took repeat one in exchange, but you can just replay it manually). Getting almost no ads right now, sometimes it's a lot of ads. They also finally added a search function to your default liked songs playlist! The app seems pretty snappy after the last update as well.
author: Samuel Cool

text: stopped working a few days ago. first the playlist vanished then the app just wouldn't startup at all just a black screen. Tried reinstalling didn't work(4 times) cleared the cache, nothing. don't know what to do now? 11 may. contracted by developers to try a clean install again and it started working again, don't know why but happy to have it back. Thanks for the quick response 👍
author: Zen

text: I've been a premium Spotify user for many years. There are hardly words for my love and appreciation for this service and the improvements they are constantly releasing. The app functions really well, but occassionally (once a month?) I lose sound while the track continues to play. This is an issue I've been troubleshooting across many devices for years.
author: Nikki

text: I love Spotify. I used to listen to music on YOUTUBE when there was an ad every 20 seconds. When I switched to this, there was only ads after every like three songs, and then it would also give you 30 minutes ad free. I got the Premium version and it made it even better. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
author: Solara

text: I don't know why but I cant log in, every time I try to log back into Spotify it kicks me out and says that I have to update the app and when I go to the app store there is no new updates and now I can't listen to music and zone out during work. And the only reason I am giving it 5 stars is so more people will see it.
author: Heather Larie

text: I love this app it's so funny and you get to listen to all of your favorite songs and videos. it has many things on it. the one thing that bothers me is the ads it has on almost every time you go on a videos but when it comes to listening to the music you get to listen for about 5 songs then it gives you about 2 Ads thoughts so I hope this gives you facts about lol 😂
author: Paige

text: I've been using Spotify for a few years and it remains my only choice for music streaming. Its key strength lies in excellent algorithmic recommendations that adapt quickly to my listening habits. But the app's true masterpiece is its user interface: a sleek, intuitive, dark-themed design that makes navigating millions of songs incredibly fluid. Combined with seamless cross-device syncing and its smart features, it's the most polished, user-friendly music app available.
author: Alek D'Santiago

text: I love to use this one! Even though it's limited and i don't have money to buy the premium, but the random songs that replace to the song I choosen was soo cool and it makes me dance! Spotify knows what my song taste like and I love it. ❤ So a 5 star is enough for how much im greatful to have you spotify and yes. You save me late at night. 😘
author: sherluck suelo

text: The free version is still pretty good. Ads are a bit of a pain in the a$$,but I can live with it. Finally took the plunge and went Premium. Haven't looked back. All Music, all the time. What's not to love. Heck, went to the Family plan, as the kids kept hating on me. Dad life, lol. But, this works. Spotify, has a lot to choose from. Not Disappointed, for sure. Recommend, Yes.
author: Vikramjit Singh

text: I'm on one of my other phones That I Know I have Spotify installed already. Now it's gone and telling me to reinstall and The App. I shouldn't have to and now I'm upset coz I can't hear my music. To tell you more would be for me to say I Love Spotify, I have no other music app at all. Not to crazy about how you guys make things become automatic playlist just coz I checked it out. I still love my life and my music. .. ♥️
author: Sonya

text: I have been a Spotify Premium subscriber for well over 10 years now and have enjoyed countless hours of great music. The exploration of music on the app is simply phenomenal and has help me grow my physical media collection into any music lover's dream. I have never had many problems, beyond normal app bugs and such, with this app. A quick reinstall has the app running much smoother and like normal. Thanks. 👍
author: Patrick Pritchard

text: Spotify is honestly one of my favorite apps ever. I love how it always seems to know exactly what I want to hear, whether I’m in my feelings or just vibing. The playlists, the endless music, the way it connects me to songs I didn’t even know I needed—it’s everything. It’s more than music to me, it’s part of my everyday life.
author: Tony Cortez

text: I now speak, think and feel in lyrics, that's how amazing their playlists are - so emotional that I've cried more than once, laughed, and best of all felt like I was on vacation right in my apartment. I bet you I could write many essays paraphrasing lyrics. I absolutely love it. BTW, they now have music videos, so when you're streaming on TV, it takes you way back, and introduces you to new stuff.
author: Laurianne Munezero

text: The free option is fantastic and better than the paid option. For the paid option I'd give it a 1 star. Offline? I am BEYOND unsatisfied. Most of the music that I rely heavily on for my Autistic needs cannot be done with this app. That alone is a massive issue for me. I'd rather deal with ads so I can listen to the music that does what I need it to so I can function better. So I cancelled my subscription. It just isn't worth $12 for me. Please fix this. Thank You!
author: Kimberly Murphy

text: Spotify's audio quality is unmatched among their competitors, even at the "free" tier. Their catalog is pretty good and it includes podcasts and news with only a slight delay in publication. My absolute only complaint is about their linux client, it is MASSIVE but that's really to be expected considering features and platform. Spotify's ads are not intrusive or overwhelming. A+
author: M

text: As a rithm guitarist I have to keep the best selection of music I can not only play but new ones that I can incorporate in my playlist. Thanks to you I have over 2000 songs on my music Library with an incredible diversity. Everything from 60's Puerto Rican and Caribbean music to Appalachian mountain progressive Bluegrass that Im currently hooked on. Thank you guys and keep up the good work.
author: George Lugo

text: The best app for listening music, even without premium it's great. Only problem with it is that when u make a shorter 8-10 song playlist without premium and you finish it, spotify gives random "suggested" songs that are not the same "taste" (you cant replay the playlist). When you search a song and play it sometimes it doest play the song you searched ecen when yiu click on it, but all in all its a great app.

Then on the 11/05/26 it came back to life again. I don't mind cause I think the app is brilliant, but sometimes just let us know it's still updating, rather than when you logged in it says, something went wrong 😬.

text: I love being able to search an artist or a song and be able to access all the songs by the artist, and even related or similar artists to build collections. I also enjoy that you dont have to purchase one song at a time, and having offline access to them as well - you just have to add them to your liked songs!

text: honestly the best music player app of all time, prefer this app to all the others, offers premium quality at a low cost even better, if you're a student, you can get an even better deal. always been the best. has features no other music player has and always stays up to date. no errors or glitches or weird stuff. thank you Spotify for your amazing app. I'm grateful for the development team for how consistently awesome this app always is.

text: had it for years. absolutely love the app. i have come across a minor inconvenience that i believe would make a fantastic tool. spotify already makes a queue for you based around the song you chose and others that the algorithm thinks youll like. now this is fantastic but sometimes it creates a list that is absolute fire and you are faced with the desire to save the queue as a playlist but that option doesnt exist or i cant find. please make this a this happen. onevery satisfied customer

text: I think it is the best music app out there. User friendly and does a good job recommending songs to me. The only draw back is not having the option of turning a song from explicit language to pg. Just so I can listen to my playlist in the workplace or near kids.

text: Fantastic advertising app. The issue is, every 3-6 ads an actual song might possibly play, might be a glitch. I want more ads. Just nothing but ads. If I wanted to actually listen to songs I would just use YouTube lol. Keep up the great work Spotify!
author: Evan Williams

text: This is the only app I would truly suggest for streaming music. On top of great music streaming it also has song downloading, which is always appreciated. One issue is that playlists do not sync well between devices, which is kind of annoying. But other than that it is a great experience.
author: Jackson Hendricks

text: "Hands down the best app for music and podcasts! The algorithm is incredibly smart and always recommends new artists that perfectly match my taste. author: DaVIES

text: I absolutely love Spotify! I have not had any issues and if you can't find a song or group anywhere else I guarantee you will find it here. My first experience with Spotify happened when I remembered a song from the 70s but didn't know the name of the song or group but after searching everywhere else I came here and lo and behold I found it on Spotify. If you love music no matter how old you are you will love this app. there's something for everyone here . THANK YOU SPOTIFY! You are awesome!
author: Terri Correnti

text: Always great variety of songs and I specifically like the recommendations I get from Spotify to find new ones. Functioning great when I m on the way, chilling at home or crunching the numbers at work. Can only recommend to all who like to listen to some nice tunes.

text: It covers the underground, and reaches into the light with musical vision that feeds the soul . Music dances along to the ears of the listener. Most of my listening is with bands, singers, religion and rock n roll, with a space for other gifted humans and electronic sidekicks. I am a 69 year old and music has always been my go to during different aspects of my crazy yet simple lifestyle. I'm thankful for the people who put Spotify together and I think it's time for full on subscription. Ricky T
author: R W Todd

text: 🤌 When I clear the cache to fix problems, my queue is deleted. Can you fix that? Also, it removed some of my downloaded music files from my Liked Songs for NO REASON. And when I open up various apps(Camera is the most frequent), my song that's playing stops, so I have to unlock my phone and resume the song. And following the destruction of my MacBook Pro, one particular downloaded audio file(which played before) won't play. If I add music videos, it replaces where they were in my Liked Songs...

text: great app! all around a very reliable music streaming service. the way Spotify was designed is a chef's kiss. the like and dislike buttons on ads are an amazing addition, which is different from all the other music services. wish i could give it 10 stars. would recommend! text: Amazing catalog of music! I had made a previous complaint they Spotify would say that I am offline whenever I opened the app. A developer was quick to reach out and share a method to try and fix it. worked like a charm. Still the best music streaming service out there.

text: I honestly love the AI Dj station. I do wish in threw in more variety and was a little less repetitive. text: I love this app. love the music 🤩 and I love the podcast. so many to look at tickets for shows. text: My experience on Spotify has been consistently smooth and enjoyable. The interface is clean and easy to navigate, making it simple to discover new music or return to old favorites. I especially like how personalized the platform feels—playlists like Discover Weekly and Daily Mix seem to understand my taste really well, often introducing me to songs I wouldn’t have found on my own. Streaming quality has been reliable, and I rarely face interruptions or buffering issues.

text: it is good after premium I used to be a non premium user and it almost made me quit Spotify and shift to other app but then free trials for premium came and I thought let's give it a try that changed my full opinion for this app I used to love it no adds no robot for my song no limit on my skips now I am a regular standard premium user and it is one of my most used apps. text: Spotify is a great application for both music and podcasts. text: Spotify is a widely loved music streaming app that offers a huge collection of songs, podcasts, and curated playlists. text: I’ve tried other streaming services, but I always come back to Spotify. The algorithm for 'Discover Weekly' and 'Daylist' is scarily accurate—it’s like having a personal DJ who knows exactly what I want to hear before I do. The interface is clean, the AI DJ is actually fun to listen to, and I love the new Lossless audio quality. Being able to switch from my phone to my laptop or smart speakers instantly with Spotify Connect is a game-changer. Worth every penny of the Premium sub!

text: It cracks me up how many people want to act like $10-15/month for Spotify's entire cataloge is somehow exorbitant. That is roughly equivalent to the price of a single, hard copy album. If you can't afford it, you can't afford it and that's no fun for you, but blaming the price point of the subscription is nonsense.

This helps when I'm out in the boonies where streaming could cut-out or if I want to conserve battery life on my phone. Did I gloss over the fact you can create playlists? That's cool too
author: Charlie Hohenstein

text: Spotify is an all-in-one music library. For eclectic tastes and busy lifestyles, it's really the "go-to" for the latest and the greatest, with a robust retro collection, and a super-easy playlist add feature, making custom playlists a snap. If you tend to like mood music you can work (or play;) to, then it's worth the DL. And Premium sets an *excellent* price-point for no-ads service; it's top-notch for those who don't like their groove interrupted! ;)
author: Danswear

text: This app is generally amazing even not having to pay for it. It works really well rarely has glitches and always loads on any device. This app is a 5/5. That's what I upgraded too but overall this app is a really good music streaming app

text: Guess it's been 3 years or so that I finally embraced an online music provider, partly because my last CD player crapped the bed, and partly because the app was already incorporated into my phone. I have few complaints, save for the fact that I wish they'd pick ONE method to inform me of the things they wish to impart, instead of doubling down via the app and email. The only other major complaint I have is that NOT everything I owned on CD is available. Other than those 2 items, I'm satisfied.
